nasb.text: You shall make a window for the ark, and finish it to a cubit from the top; and set the door of the ark in the side of it; you shall make it with lower, second, and third decks.

esv.text: Make a roof for the ark, and finish it to a cubit above, and set the door of the ark in its side. Make it with lower, second, and third decks.

cnv.text: 方舟上面四周要做透光口，高四十四公寸；方舟的門要開在旁邊；方舟要分為上中下三層建造。

ccb.text: 舟顶要有五十厘米高的透光口，门开在方舟的侧面，整艘方舟要分为上、中、下三层。

csbs.text: 你要为方舟造一个天窗，在离顶部一肘处造好；方舟的门要设在侧面。方舟要造成上、中、下三层。
